rollback_expectations: restore sandbox auth.json byte-for-byte if post-import owner truth remains blocked
do not mutate the external source path

why_import: current owner truth shows the problem is auth-source content, not binding
read-only override proves this exact source path clears the primary 401 blocker
registry currently points at the target sandbox auth.json path already
why_not_rebind: no different sandbox-local target auth path is evidenced
rebind would not change the secret content in the currently bound file
why_not_combined: no current evidence requires registry mutation
combined contour would widen secret-bearing rollback scope without necessity
